statement.informal: Multiplication on the positive reals is a single F16 node: F16fn(x, y) = exp(log(x) + log(y)) = x · y for x, y > 0. The headline 'mul_pos = 1n' result that drops the SuperBEST positive-domain headline from 16n to 14n. (over Complex instead of Real)
statement.formal_lean:
theorem mul_one_node_positive (x y : ℝ) (hx : 0 < x) (hy : 0 < y) :
    Complex.exp (Complex.log x + Complex.log y) = x * y

tactics:
theorem mul_one_node_positive (x y : ℝ) (hx : 0 < x) (hy : 0 < y) :
    Complex.exp (Complex.log x + Complex.log y) = x * y := by
  rw [Complex.exp_add, Complex.exp_log hx, Complex.exp_log hy]

metadata.verification_pending: Phase 1.5 — port legacy theorems to MachLib foundations before kernel re-verification.
